name: freshdesk
description: Reads Freshdesk support resources and exposes fixed Freshdesk REST API v2 operations through streams, bounded JSON direct reads, and gated reverse-ETL write actions.

risk.read: external Freshdesk API reads of support, contact, company, team, admin, collaboration, and settings records through streams and bounded direct reads
risk.write: Freshdesk create, update, merge, restore, export-job, admin, and delete operations are named reverse-ETL actions; execution requires plan, preview, approval, and destructive confirmation for high-risk deletes/admin changes
risk.approval: Freshdesk writes require reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, execute; destructive/high-risk writes require typed confirmation
